text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Hey there, Traineroonie.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
While I'm strolling through the<n>academy one
evening, Seiun Sky<n>waves me over for another
session<n>of the murder mystery game.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Okay, so let's continue from where<n>we left off.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Last time, we discovered that the<n>poisoned egg
custard had been<n>switched out. The original was in
a<n>yellow bowl, but the poisoned one<n>was in a blue
bowl.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
And since El visited King's room after<n>the meal
was served, she's looking<n>pretty sus right now.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
No, no, no! It was just a coincidence<n>that I dropped
by after the food was<n>served! There's no proof
that it was<n>me!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Well, that's true. Which just means<n>we're gonna
have to continue our<n>investigation.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
All right, this marks the start of phase<n>two. Trainer,
please read the script.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
As requested, I check the instructions<n>in the GM
script. It looks like the next<n>step is...
choice_data_list: Everyone is now permitted to reveal their secrets.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Secrets? Are we all supposed to have<n>one?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Ah, yep—looks like they're written in<n>our individual
booklets. It should say<n>"secret for phase two only"
on it.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
We might end up with a different<n>suspect once we
hear this new<n>information. ...What do you think,
everyone?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: We might indeed. Well then, may I<n>speak first?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
The truth is... after I served the food,<n>King went to
the bathroom. It seemed<n>as if she'd forgotten
something.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: ...What?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Oh? So you're saying that King left<n>the room after
the food was served.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Curious indeed, don't you think? If<n>King left the
room after her food was<n>served, then anybody
could have<n>snuck in without being spotted.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
In other words, anyone could have<n>switched the
bowls... And so,<n>everybody is a suspect.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Bueno! That means I'm not the only<n>suspect
anymore!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
And I've got a special secret of my<n>own to reveal!
So, actually, when I<n>went to see King...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
The bowl was already blue! Meaning<n>the culprit
had already entered the<n>room!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it was already blue? That's a<n>rather intriguing
piece of information.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
The more we know, the easier it'll be<n>to narrow
down the suspects. Spe,<n>Sei, care to share your
secrets?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
O-okay, I've got something too... So,<n>actually, I
was with Grass from just<n>after she served dinner
right up until<n>we all gathered here. But while we
were together...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I caught a very brief glimpse of Sei<n>walking along
holding something...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Oh? You saw me?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Interesting. She was holding<n>something? It
couldn't have been... a<n>yellow bowl, could it?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, Sherlock here's giving me the
heebie-jeebies. So the spotlight of<n>suspicion's
shining on me now, huh?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Well, this isn't looking too good...<n>Hey, help me out
here, Trainer.
choice_data_list:
Were you carrying cleaning supplies or
something?

Hang on... Are you really just an ordinary
housekeeper?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Oooh, nice job backing me up there.<n>Yep, I'm a
housekeeper, so I carry all<n>kinds of cleaning
supplies around<n>with me.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Hmm... That's actually muysospechosa. I mean, this is Seiwe're talking about here.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Hey now, first the spotlight and now<n>the shade?
Who do you take me for?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: But anyways... You caught me...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Everyone waits with bated breath to<n>see how the
cornered Seiun Sky will<n>respond.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: ...Spe's telling the truth. I waswalking around the inn holdingsomething.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Surprisingly, she openly admits to it.<n>Is she
planning something here?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Ordinary is subjective. Maybe I'm<n>actually the
best housekeeper in the<n>world. Nya-ha-ha.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
But for real, that was more of a<n>sabotage than a
helping hand. You're<n>making this harder.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: But anyways... If you really must<n>know...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Everyone waits with bated breath to<n>see how the
cornered Seiun Sky will<n>respond.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: ...Spe's telling the truth. I waswalking around the inn holdingsomething.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Surprisingly, she openly admits to it.<n>Is she
planning something here?
